1.1: Sanna — the healing-woman who keeps to the north slope; hunters trade her dried herbs, and Aderyn means to ask what she has seen come down off the high ground.

2.1: The Far-ridge Path — the drove-road that climbs to the high pass where the lights have been seen; her road, if she takes it.
2.2: The snowline and the deer-paths — her country; she knows the wild turns against those who do not belong to it, and that lately something has made it worse.

content._: What aderyn has come to know — names recognised; absence means perceived by appearance.
